Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on territory planning from our last session.

[00:18:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:31:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?
